arts.ttl: Two sources claim Liverpool are very keen on signing £50m Premier League star
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly very interested in a potential transfer swoop for Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen this summer. The talented 19-year-old has looked hugely impressive for Bournemouth this season and it makes sense that he now seems to be on the radar of a number of top clubs. arts.ttl: Liverpool’s secret weapon in attempt to land “perfect” front man
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez has flattered to deceive at Liverpool during the 2024/25 campaign, and he’s set to be used as a makeweight in a deal for a new Reds striker. In 34 games in all competitions this season, the Uruguayan has scored just six goals and assisted five more (transfermarkt). arts.ttl: Paul Merson sets Liverpool two-game points target to make title race 'virtually over'
arts.sum: Liverpool are seven points clear of Arsenal in the Premier League title race and former Gunners star Paul Merson believes their clashes with Aston Villa and Manchester City are huge

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Gomez might need surgery after 'big blow'
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Joe Gomez could require surgery after suffering another hamstring injury, Arne Slot tells a news conference.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Aston Villa: Premier League

arts.ttl: Sources: Mo Salah has shown his desire for what’s next in recent Liverpool negotiations
arts.sum: Mo Salah and his representatives have held another round of transfer talks with Liverpool and it’s believed the Egyptian King made his preference as to what’s next in his career crystal clear.
